results.title: Lionel Scaloni hints at Argentina exit after FIFA World Cup 2026 final defeat
results.description: Lionel Scaloni has suggested he could leave his role as Argentina head coach after his contract ends in December following the FIFA World Cup 2026 final defeat to Spain, with the final decision expected after talks with the Argentina football federation.

results.title: Monsoon 2026 Fifth Driest In 126 Years As Bihar, Kerala, Telangana Bear The Brunt
results.description: 60% of districts in India face rain deficit, but SBI Research says food prices unlikely to spike.

results.title: Warangal youth first: MLA Naini on Kazipet coach factory jobs
Gilmore Girls' original Ontario home is up for sale after 24 years and fans can own Lorelai and Rory's first TV house. Here's how much it costs
results.description: The house used as Lorelai and Rory Gilmore's home in the pilot episode is now for sale. This historic property is located in Unionville, Markham, Ontario, Canada. The asking price for this television memorabilia is CAD $3.88 million. The spacious Victorian home offers modern comforts and a detached heritage bakery building. This rare listing provides fans a unique chance to own a piece of television history.

results.title: Messi Wax Statue Ahead of World Cup Final
results.description: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup final between Argentina and Spain, sculptor Susanta Ray created a stunning wax statue of Argentine superstar Lionel Messi, celebrating one of football's greatest icons.
